name: muscle
description: MUSCLE is a self-learning code review plugin for Claude Code and Codex-style workflows. It combines static analyzers, MiniMax semantic review, project-local memory, command evidence, savings reports, discovery, trust-gated filters, model routing, reusable context packs, and plugin lifecycle diagnostics. Project-local memory always stays primary; related-project lessons and model packs are optional overlays. Commands: /muscle:cancel, /muscle:check, /muscle:diagnosis, /muscle:discover, /muscle:doctor, /muscle:filters, /muscle:history, /muscle:kb-stats, /muscle:lifeline, /muscle:long-eval-benchmark, /muscle:long-eval-reports, /muscle:memory-history, /muscle:memory-import-project, /muscle:memory-related, /muscle:model-history, /muscle:model-pack-install, /muscle:model-pack-submit, /muscle:model-select, /muscle:model-status, /muscle:optimize-host-docs, /muscle:pack, /muscle:pressure, /muscle:probe, /muscle:rescue, /muscle:result, /muscle:review, /muscle:route, /muscle:savings, /muscle:settings-api-key, /muscle:settings-model, /muscle:settings-review, /muscle:settings-show, /muscle:setup, /muscle:status
